description: yOUTH SECTION Largest Serbion Daily in America THE AMERICAN SREOBRAN 3414 FIFTH AVENUE PITTSEURGH PA GYEIE o VOL XXXIV Mich Pa Chests Pad Yugoslav Relief Totals to 1412850 IWAS SLAYER OF AUSTRIAN ARCHDUKE REINCARNATION OF MILOS OBILICH Martinovich of Johnstown Pa Latest to Give 100 Maj Cukela Donates SSO Thiis Story of Serbian History Reveals Prophecy of Hero Made 552 Years Ago That Blows Would Be Struck Against All Oppressors of Serb Nation and Serb Peoples By B D KALABICH Editors Note In the wake of Axis occupation of Yugoslavia Mr Kalabichs dramatic tale of a sixcenturiesold prophecy becomes a subject matter of timely significance Will the prophesy ever apply against the Axis agressors Will andther blow be struck in defense of the Serbs traditional loye of honor liberty and freedom Who will represent the reincarnation of Milos Obilich during the present era of domination These and similar questions are 13id open for conjecture after one reading of this faseinating story of Serb history It was written in 1921 and originally intended for pablication in the Detroit scul Pires However in peace time there is never a particular cry for such a behindthescenes feature Hence Mr Kalabich saved his story
